channel.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Feb 5th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries

Webpack Plugins

  • Public Path Manipulation Pluginstars147 - control publicPath of dynamically loaded resources at runtime -- Maintainer: Andrew Goldis

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Shell Loaderstars17 - Run an arbitrary shell script on source files. -- Maintainer: Jo Sprague
  • Lingui Loader - Compile message catalogs on the fly for jsLingui, i18n library -- Maintainer: Tomáš Ehrlich

    • Research & Training

    Other

  • Visual config tool for webpack - A visual tool for creating webpack configs in your browser

    • Libraries

    Component & Template

  • Twig Loaderstars76 - Twig template loader. -- Maintainer: Zimmo.be Team

    • Research & Training

    Courses

  • Webpack 4 Fundamentals - Brief introduction about Webpack fundamentals by Sean Larkin

    • Research & Training

    React

  • Razzle Material-UI Styled Examplestars117 - With Styled Components using Express with compression from Erik Engi.

    • Libraries

    Integration Libraries

  • Consul Key/Value Webpackstars6: Compiles environment variables into your bundle via Consul KV-store. -- Maintainer: Marlon Maxwel

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Jun 9th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries

Webpack Plugins

  • PurgeCSS Webpack Pluginstars300 - A plugin to remove unused css with purgecss -- Maintainer: Floriel Fedry
  • Friendly errorsstars729 - Recognizes certain classes of webpack errors and cleans, aggregates and prioritizes them. -- Maintainer: Geoffroy Warin

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Icon Font Loaderstars87 - Converts svgs into font icons in CSS. -- Maintainer: Forrest R. Zhao
  • Icons Loader - Generates an iconfont from SVG dependencies. -- Maintainer: Mike Vercoelen

    • Libraries

    Webpack Tools

  • Speed Measure Pluginstars1.8k - Measures the speed of your webpack plugins and loaders. -- Maintainer: Stephen Cook

    • Libraries

    Language & Framework

  • Fengari Loaderstars28: Run Lua code using Fengari. -- Maintainer: Daurnimator

    • Libraries

    File Type

  • GraphQL Loaderstars58: .graphql document loader. -- Maintainer: Stephen Wan

    • Libraries

    Webpack Tools

  • Webpack Dashboardstars13.8k: A CLI dashboard for webpack dev server. -- Maintainer: Formidable Labs

    • Webpack Ecosystem

    Twitter

  • Kees Kluskens - @keeskluskens: - Software Engineer at Code Yellow, Webpack core team member.

    • Research & Training

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Oct 5th, 2016
item.description:
Research & Training

Articles

  • Jamund Ferguson | 22-Jul-16 - Manually Tuning Webpack Builds.
  • Sean T. Larkin | 21-Jul-16 - Learn and Debug webpack with Chrome Dev Tools!.
  • Raja Rao DV | 10-Apr-16 - Webpack  —  The Confusing Parts.
  • Jonathan Creamer | 25-Feb-16 - WebPack Code splitting with ES6 and Babel 6.
  • Sebastian De Deyne | 04-Feb-16 - Adventure Time With Webpack.
  • Andy Ccs | 02-Jan-16 - Webpack and Docker for Development and Deployment.
  • Nader Dabit | 07-Sept-15 - Beginner’s guide to Webpack.
  • Jonathan Creamer | 02-Sept-15 - Advanced WebPack Part 1 - The CommonsChunk Plugin.
  • Maxime Fabre | 16-Oct-15 - Webpack your bags.

    • Research & Training

    Videos

  • Mirko Nasato (5 Part Series) | 07-Jun-16 - Angular2 with Webpack Project Setup.
  • Jonathan Creamer at Nodevember | 05-Dec-15 - Advanced WebPack.
  • Kyle Robinson Young | 08-Jul-15 - Getting Started with Webpack.
  • Tasveer Singh at TorontoJS Tech Talk | 09-Apr-15 - Webpack.
  • Jeremy Lund at Mountain West JS | 28-Mar-15 - Gift Wrap Your Code with Webpack.
  • Front End Center Webpack from First Principles | 22-Aug-16 - Intro to Webpack
  • Sean Larkin on AngularAir | 03-Aug-16 - ngAir 75 - Webpack 2 with Sean Larkin.
  • Eric Clemmons chat with Kent C. Dodds | 01-Jul-16 - Webpack HMR.

    • Webpack Ecosystem

    Twitter

  • Patrick Stapleton - @gdi2290 from AngularClass, AngularAir and Angular Universalstars3.8k. Webpack member.
  • Jonathan Creamer - @jcreamer898: Microsoft MVP and Telerik Developer Expert.
  • Juho Vepsäläinen - @bebraw from SurviveJS and webpack core team member.
  • Eric Clemmons - @ericclemmons VP of Software Development at HigherEdHQ. Webpack member.
  • Kent C. Dodds - @kentcdodds from PayPal Engineering and JavaScript Air. Webpack member.
  • Johannes Ewald - @Jhnnns: Webpack core team member.
  • Joshua Wiens - @d3viant0ne: Technical Lead for EasyMetrics. Webpack member.

    • Webpack Ecosystem

    Community

  • StackOverflow
  • Medium
  • Gitter Chat

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Resolve URL Loaderstars496: Resolves relative paths in url() statements. -- Maintainer: Ben Holloway
  • Modernizr Loader - Get your modernizr build bundled with webpack. -- Maintainer: Peerigon Devs

    • Libraries

    Testing

  • Istanbul Webpack pluginstars4: Use Istanbul instrumenter for the whole pack. -- Maintainer: Hagai Cohen

    • Libraries

    Integration Libraries

  • Terse Webpackstars213 - Webpack simplified in a fluent API with presets. -- Maintainer: Eric Clemmons

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Aug 12th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

Webpack Plugins

  • SW Precachestars1.4k - Generates a service worker to precache bundle. -- Maintainer: Will Farley
  • CoreJS Pluginstars16 - Core-JS as a webpack plugin. -- Maintainer: PatrickJS

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Aug 4th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries

File Type

  • File Loaderstars1.8k: File loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • URL Loaderstars1.4k: URL loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • HTML Loaderstars1.1k: HTML loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Raw Loaderstars803: Raw file loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Image Loaderstars161: Image minimizing loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: Andy VanWagoner
  • SVG Url Loaderstars218: Loader which loads SVG file as utf-8 encoded Url. -- Maintainer: Hovhannes Babayan
  • json5 Loaderstars72: json5 loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • json Loaderstars432: json loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team

    • Libraries

    Component & Template

  • Angular2 Template Loaderstars205: Inlines html and style's in Angular2 components. -- Maintainer: Sean Larkin
  • Handlebars Loaderstars506: A handlebars template loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Paul Carduner
  • Vue Loaderstars4.6k: Webpack loader for Vue.js components. -- Maintainer: Vuejs Team
  • SVG React Loaderstars556 - Webpack SVG to React Component Loader. -- Maintainer: Jerry Hamlet
  • Underscore Loaderstars99 - Underscore and Lodash template loader. -- Maintainer: Emmanuel Antico
  • ngTemplate Loaderstars241 - Angular1 Template Loader. -- Maintainer: Toby Rahilly

    • Libraries

    Styles

  • Style Loaderstars1.5k: Style loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • PostCSS Loaderstars2.7k: PostCSS loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: PostCSS Team
  • CSS Loaderstars4k: CSS loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • SASS Loaderstars3.6k: SASS loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Jorik Tangelder
  • Less Loaderstars857: Less loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Stylus Loaderstars484: A stylus loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: Kyle Robinson Young
  • Isomorphic Style Loaderstars1.2k: Isomorphic CSS style loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Kriasoft Team

    • Libraries

    Language & Framework

  • TS Loaderstars3k: TypeScript loader for webpack. -- Maintainer: TypeStrong Team
  • Awesome TypeScript Loaderstars2.4k: Awesome TS loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Stanislav Panferov
  • Coffee Loaderstars132: Coffee loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Bootstrap Loaderstars1k: Load Bootstrap styles in your Webpack bundle. -- Maintainer: ShakaCode Team
  • ELM Loaderstars530: Webpack loader for the Elm programming language. -- Maintainer: Richard Feldman

    • Libraries

    Utility

  • Babel Loaderstars4.5k: Webpack plugin for Babel. -- Maintainer: Babel Team
  • JSHint Loaderstars68: JSHint loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • JSCS Loaderstars23: Run your source through the JSCS style checker. -- Maintainer: Daniel Perez Alvarez
  • Bundle Loaderstars669: Bundle loader for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Worker Loaderstars1.3k: Worker loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Import Loaderstars499: Imports loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • SourceMap Loaderstars296: Extract sourceMappingURL comments from modules. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Combine Loader - Converts a loaders array into a single loader string. -- Maintainer: James Friend

    • Libraries

    Testing

  • Mocha Loaderstars145: Mocha loader module for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Karma Webpackstars818: Use Karma with Webpack. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team

    • Libraries

    Integration Libraries

  • SystemJS Webpackstars27 - Webpack bundling for SystemJS. -- Maintainer: Guy Bedford
  • Gulp Webpack Streamstars1.4k - Run webpack through a stream interface. -- Maintainer: Kyle Robinson Young

    • Libraries

    Webpack Plugins

  • Extract Text Pluginstars4.1k: Extract text from bundle into a file. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Compression Pluginstars1.2k: Prepare assets to serve with Content-Encoding. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Offline Pluginstars4.4k: Offline plugin (ServiceWorker, AppCache) for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Arthur Stolyar
  • Rewire Pluginstars123: Dependency injection for Webpack bundles. -- Maintainer: Johannes Ewald
  • HTML Webpack Pluginstars9.6k: Simplifies creation of HTML files. -- Maintainer: Jan Nicklas
  • Copy Webpack Pluginstars2.6k: Copy files and directories in webpack. -- Maintainer: Len Boyette
  • Split By Pathstars107: Split By Path Webpack Plugin. -- Maintainer: Bohdan Tkachenko

    • Libraries

    Webpack Tools

  • Webpack Dev Middlewarestars2.3k: Middleware which arguments a live bundle. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Webpack Dev Serverstars6.9k: Serves a webpack app. Updates the browser on changes. -- Maintainer: Webpack Team
  • Webpack Mergestars2.4k - Merge designed for Webpack. -- Maintainer: Juho Vepsäläinen
  • NPM Install Webpackstars1.4k - Automatically install & save deps with Webpack. -- Maintainer: Eric Clemmons
  • Webpack Validatorstars295 - Validates your webpack config with Joi. -- Maintainer: js-dxtools Team
  • Webpack Config Utilsstars252 - Util. to make your webpack config easier to read. -- Maintainer: Kent C. Dodds
  • Angular2 Webpack Toolkitstars16 - Webpack tools and helpers for Angular 2. -- Maintainer: AngularClass
  • HJS Webpackstars1.8k: Helpers/presets for setting up webpack with hotloading. -- Maintainer: Henrik Joreteg

    • Research & Training

    Other

  • Juho, Johannes, Tobias & Sean on JavaScript Air - JavaScript Air podcast

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Aug 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Research & Training

Angular

  • Angular2 Webpack Visual Studiostars497 - ASP.NET Core, Angular2 with Webpack and Visual Studio from Damien Bod.
  • Angular2 Starterstars69 - Angular2 starter kit with Typescript and Webpack from Brian Schemp.
  • Angular2 SPA - Angular 2 ASP.NET Core Spa from Steve Sanderson.
  • Angular2 Seedstars1k - A simple starter demonstrating the basic concepts of Angular2 from Pawel Kozlowski.

    • Research & Training

    Framework Agnostic

  • ES6 TodoMVC with Webpackstars351 - Repo used to teach webpack. (Check branches). from Kent C. Dodds.

    • Research & Training

    React

  • Create React Appstars87.8k - Create React apps with no build configuration from Dan Abramov.
  • React Starter Kitstars20.7k - Isomorphic web app boilerplate from Kriasoft Team.
  • React Redux Universalstars12k - A starter boilerplate for a universal webapp from Erik Rasmussen.
  • Frontend Boilerplatestars3k - A boilerplate of things that mostly shouldn't exist from TJ Holowaychuk.
  • React Native Calculatorstars5.1k - Mobile, desktop and website Apps with the same code from Benoit Vallon.
  • React Cordova Boilerplatestars206 - TodoMVC example for React with Cordova from Yuval Saraf.

item.title: webpack-contrib/awesome-webpack Aug 2nd, 2016
item.description:
Research & Training

Courses

  • Intro to webpack (playlist) - Egghead.io playlist of a few videos by Kent C. Dodds (the first is free).
  • Angular and Webpack for modular applications - Egghead.io course by Kent C. Dodds
  • Using Webpack for Production JavaScript Applications - Egghead.io course by Kent C. Dodds (advanced)
  • Webpack Fundamentals - Joe Eames for Pluralsight (intermediate)

    • Research & Training

    Webpack Examples

  • Webpack Examples: Examples of common Webpack functionality.

    • Research & Training

    Angular

  • Angular2 Webpack Starterstars10.4k - A Webpack driven Angular 2 Starter kit from AngularClass.
